trigger_reason: R725 is rank 2 by mechanical-PASS proximity in E29 (kw=2, max sim=0.40, q=0.35). Per program_v10.md §2.5, top-3 rounds receive full step-13 spec.
candidate_stripped: Heegaard-splitting-based LLM behavior diagnostic: view behavior space as a 3-manifold; decompose into knowledge/reasoning handlebodies; genus of gluing surface as diagnostic.

dataset.name: MMLU subset (1K questions across 4 subjects: math, history, biology, law)

A_candidate.name: Heegaard-genus behavior diagnostic (R725)
A_candidate.description: Embed each MMLU question into the model's hidden state space (last-layer pooled). Treat the embedding cloud across 1K questions as a sampled 3-manifold via t-SNE to 3D. Compute approximate Heegaard genus via simplicial complex Betti-1. Group questions by subject; diagnose genus per subject.
A_candidate.distinctive_parameter: Heegaard genus estimate (via Betti-1 of dimensionality-reduced simplicial complex)
A_candidate.expected_behavior: If knowledge vs reasoning structurally separate, genus is lower for knowledge-heavy subjects (history, biology) and higher for reasoning subjects (math).

B_control.name: Random-shuffle 3D embedding (no Heegaard structure)
B_control.description: Same hidden-state embeddings → t-SNE 3D, but shuffle the question labels before genus computation. Genus computed identically.
B_control.expected_behavior: Null hypothesis: genus uniform across (randomized) subject labels.

C_baseline.name: MMLU accuracy by subject (Llama-3 published baseline)
C_baseline.description: Published MMLU accuracy per subject for Llama-3-8B.

metric.name: Spearman correlation between genus and accuracy per subject
metric.measurement_protocol: Compute Heegaard-genus-estimate per subject (4 subjects × 3 seeds for t-SNE init = 12 values); compute Spearman correlation with MMLU accuracy.

statistical_test.name: Spearman correlation significance test A vs C + paired t-test A vs B on genus values
statistical_test.expected_outcome_if_candidate_has_value: Genus negatively correlates with accuracy (r < -0.5, p < 0.05).
statistical_test.expected_outcome_if_candidate_collapses_: A indistinguishable from B; no meaningful genus signal.

distinguishability_pre_check.rationale: Heegaard genus on a 1K-sample 3D embedding is fundamentally a Betti-1 count of a simplicial complex. The 'topological information' is in the Betti number, NOT in the Heegaard splitting per se — any topological invariant (Euler char, Betti-1) would give equivalent signal. Conditioning the candidate on Heegaard-splitting framing adds zero distinguishability beyond raw Betti-1. R725 is parametrization-only: the Heegaard label is decorative; the underlying measurement is generic TDA.
distinguishability_pre_check.implication: FLAG R725 as PARAMETRIZATION-ONLY. Step 13's distinguishability check correctly identifies that the Heegaard framing does not add empirical content. Would receive PASS_WITH_EMPIRICAL_CAVEAT label if step 10 had PASSed.

notes_for_executor: Use HF transformers + bitsandbytes 8-bit for Llama-3-8B fit on T4 16GB. t-SNE to 3D; simplicial complex via gudhi with epsilon-graph distance.
